creator: rehsack@web.de
text:
Hi,

because of you've closed PR ports/119112: [PATCH] devel/perltidy: update to 
20071205 after applying attached patch, you may close DUPLICATE 
ports/119624: devel/perltidy update to 20071205, too.

Thanks in advance,
Jens
